THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HEALTH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOKONEN, TADDESE BLUEFORD, ERLENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 64 TURK STREET, #403, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL FEB-24-2009, LEASE FORFEITED, IF THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE BY THE ABOVE-DATE AND TIME, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $561.56, UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $18.71 PER DAY FROM 12/1/2008 THROUGH 02/24/2009, COST OF $335.00, ATTORNEY'S FEES $0.0 FOR A TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $2,505.62 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
